LAW AND MOTION 301, ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION CONTINUED FROM MAR-28-2003 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-04-2003, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO STAY THE DISMANTLING OF THE VECHICLE. THE COURT CONTINUED PLAINTIFF BARRY G INGRAM'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION TO APRIL 4, 2003. ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-04-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Peter Mallon, Esq. of NIESAR & DIAMOND 882-5300, Specially appearing for respondent Pick Your Part Auto Wrecking dba The City Tow

RULING:
Upon representation of counsel, the Court took plaintiff's application for preliminary injunction off calendar per parties' stipulation. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Continued To Apr-04-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Barry G. Ingram appearing in propria persona 846-3042, moving for preliminary
injunction
Peter Mallon, Esq., 949/752-2444, specially appearing for respondent Pick Your Part Auto Wrecking dba The City Tow. Also appearing was Peter Cheng, Claims Manager

RULING:
The parties stipulated to stay the dismantling of the vechicle. The Court continued PLAINTIFF BARRY G INGRAM's application for Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction to April 4, 2003. Plaintiff's reply due on 4/2. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
